channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham under pressure to identify seat for Westminster return

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown

item.title: The Guardian: ‘Is he getting rid of Starmer?’ Profile boost for Streeting in Ilford North seat - The Guardian
